optionsFca._note: All fca-sifu connection & behaviour options. These replace config.json's optionsFca block.
optionsFca._stealthMode_note: true = forces updatePresence:false + online:false + simulateTyping:false for stealth. false = use above values as-is.
optionsFca.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S928B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
optionsFca._persona_note: desktop | mobile — affects headers sent to Facebook
optionsFca._proxy_note: HTTP/SOCKS proxy string e.g. 'socks5://user:pass@host:port' or null to disable
optionsFca._bypassRegion_note: Force a Facebook edge region e.g. 'prn', 'lax', 'sin'. null = auto
optionsFca._rateLimit_note: Request throttle. Increase maxConcurrentRequests/maxRequestsPerMinute for busy bots, decrease for safer operation.

antiSuspension._note: warmupOnStart=true throttles messages for 20 min after fresh start to avoid FB spam detection.

healthMonitor._note: Logs connection health periodically. logIntervalMs in milliseconds.

antiSpam._note: Blocks duplicate messages sent within dupeTtlMs ms. Set enabled=false or dupeTtlMs=0 to disable. maxBroadcastThreads = max threads bot can broadcast to at once.

shield._note: Anti-ban rate limiter. enabled=false → disables all Shield delays. msgDelay: ms between each outgoing message (default 1500). threadDelay: ms between messages in same thread. burstLimit/maxConsecutive: how many messages before a rest pause. restMinMs/restMaxMs: rest period duration. quietHours=false disables the 1.8× night multiplier.
